title: Job Token Management
description: The 'security/token' directory in Hadoop MapReduce architecture manages job tokens. JobTokenSecretManager.java creates, stores, and retrieves job token secrets using a TreeMap cache. JobTokenSelector.java identifies and returns the first matching job token, checking for JobTokenIdentifier.KIND_NAME and service match. Both components collaborate, ensuring secure and efficient job token management, following Secret Manager and Token Selector patterns.
